register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Let's set you up to build your custom ERP.
register.languageInfo: Important: this is the language the AI assistant will speak and the language your generated ERPs will be created in. Each project locks its language at creation time — you can change your account language later for new projects, but existing projects keep the language they were created with.
